audience: VTJ staff handling repeated shared-inbox triage and customer replies
product_feel: Gmail-speed workbench with Front/Help Scout style shared-inbox ownership and Superhuman-style action clarity
design_principles: Expose operational state before action: environment, read-only/write, production readiness, and selected queue must be visible without opening drawers.
Make queues scannable: store/channel, assignee, and status counts should read like stable work lists, not hidden filters.
Protect irreversible actions: reply send surfaces must show identity, recipient, body readiness, and blockers near the send buttons.
Keep density high and decoration low: compact rows, restrained color, stable controls, and no marketing-style panels.
borrowed_patterns: Gmail: persistent search, keyboard-first toolbar, preview-pane list/detail rhythm.
Front: shared inbox ownership, assignment load, channel queues.
Help Scout: saved views and tags as operational filters.
Superhuman: quick action confidence, command palette affordance, and explicit shortcut hints.
scope: Work-mode tabs with visible queue counts
Explicit ownership action labels in detail header and Gmail external reply blocker
Takeover reason clarity when Gmail reply is blocked by another owner
Responsive action rail without clipped toolbar or work-mode labels
Wide desktop split-pane behavior where the list expands and the reading pane stays stable
Same-page wide-to-ultrawide browser resize where the reading pane remains stable and the list absorbs extra width
Rapid repeated-email preview switching without stale body flash, retained scroll position, or layout jump
Detail header sender-address visibility without adding header height or horizontal overflow
Detail work context recipient/store visibility without adding a new detail header line
must_not_do: Do not mutate GitHub or Google Sheets.
Do not add decorative gradients, hero layouts, or card-heavy marketing UI.
verification: Browser screenshot workbench tabs/detail context desktop/narrow
Browser screenshot rapid preview switch before/after
Ownership CTA DOM check for detail owner and Gmail external reply blocker
Takeover reason modal DOM check for current owner, next owner, and Gmail reply note
Frame-sampled stale body, scroll reset, and overflow check during rapid preview switch
Browser screenshot and DOM metrics for Amazon detail sender-address visibility
Browser screenshots and DOM metrics for Amazon detail recipient/store context at 1120/1280/1680 widths
